text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm heading over to<n>my office...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Rain or shine, heaven or hell... I'll<n>bring the
thunder!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Nah, that's not it. I've gotta be more<n>like... "I'll
bring the THUNDERRR!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Urk! H-h-how long have you been<n>there?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You better not tell anyone about this!<n>Getting
caught practicing how to be<n>cool is like the
uncoolest thing ever!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that line's actually way<n>cooler than it
sounded just now. I just<n>haven't perfected it
yet!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's from a scene in my favorite<n>delinquent
manga where the protag<n>vows to overthrow the
top brass and<n>declares war on the boss.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: They're all like, "Rain or shine,heaven or hell... I'll bring the thunder!"Maaaan! Talk about cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But it doesn't sound right when I say<n>it,
y'know? I dunno, I don't feel like<n>I'm being...
menacing enough. Hm...
choice_data_list: Try making yourself look more threatening.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Make myself look more threatening,<n>huh? I never
thought of that! The<n>characters in the manga are
all swole,<n>so that could work!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I get jacked like them, I might be<n>able to see
the world from their<n>perspective!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm sold! Time to get ripped! Thanks<n>for the tip!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, I hear around school that<n>Vodka's
been hitting the gym with<n>renewed vigor.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Intimidating poses, huh? I guess they<n>do strike
some sweet poses in the<n>manga...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
How's this? Or maybe somethin' like<n>this?
Whaddabout this? Man, posing<n>actually uses a
lot of muscles!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm gettin' all pumped now! Y'know<n>what?
I'mma bring my mirror over.<n>Thanks for the tip!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's deep dive into posing<n>apparently
continues late into the<n>night.
